elements.title: lang::report_page_085_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_gi.id,
       kbi_gi.itemname                            as activity,
       kbi_c.shortname                            as course_shortname,
       kbi_c.fullname                             as course_fullname,
       kbi_o.fullname                             as outcome_fullname,
       kbi_o.shortname                            as outcome_shortname,
       kbi_o.description                          as outcome_description,
       kbi_sci.scale,
       kbi_ca.name                                as category,
       kbi_c.startdate,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE
                   WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                   ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS average_grade,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_g.id)                   AS grades
FROM mdl_grade_outcomes kbi_o
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_o.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_categories kbi_ca ON kbi_ca.id = kbi_c.category
       LEFT JOIN mdl_scale kbi_sci ON kbi_sci.id = kbi_o.scaleid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.outcomeid = kbi_o.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id
WHERE kbi_gi.itemtype = 'mod'
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
GROUP BY kbi_gi.id,
         kbi_g.itemid,
         kbi_gi.itemname,
         kbi_c.shortname,
         kbi_c.fullname,
         kbi_o.fullname,
         kbi_o.shortname,
         kbi_o.description,
         kbi_sci.scale,
         kbi_ca.name,
         kbi_c.startdate
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname, kbi_gi.itemname, kbi_o.fullname
